userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 17 Start date can not be prior to insertion date unless full coupon is activated
MW id 1 Not possible in VCON to have Mutual breaks
MW id 2 Not possible in VCON to have Compounding
MW id 7 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Receive 0.0000% on fixed leg Pay GBP LIBOR 3M on floating leg 543,867 Expiry 01 oct 2057
